failure.error_msg: Error: Counter value 000000011110, expected 1 when sw_req_i is asserted assert LogicArray('000000011110', Range(11, 'downto', 0)) == 1 + where LogicArray('000000011110', Range(11, 'downto', 0)) = LogicArrayObject(cvdp_copilot_perf_counters.p_count_o).value + where LogicArrayObject(cvdp_copilot_perf_counters.p_count_o) = HierarchyObject(cvdp_copilot_perf_counters).p_count_o

Error: Counter value 3, expected 1 after overflow assert 3 == 1 + where 3 = int(LogicArray('000000000011', Range(11, 'downto', 0))) + where LogicArray('000000000011', Range(11, 'downto', 0)) = LogicArrayObject(cvdp_copilot_perf_counters.p_count_o).value + where LogicArrayObject(cvdp_copilot_perf_counters.p_count_o) = HierarchyObject(cvdp_copilot_perf_counters).p_count_o
